## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or API keys
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] `config.yaml` updated if new config keys added
- [ ] `README.md` updated if usage changed
- [ ] New feeds inherit from `BaseFeed`
